availability_rule: AssetEODCompletionTime must be >= observation time + 1 day; timestamps are naive UTC

excluded_on_purpose.exchange_flow_metrics: address-tag history can change and is inadmissible without point-in-time tags
excluded_on_purpose.post_2023_rows: preserve 2024 and later source and outcome windows
excluded_on_purpose.price_or_market_cap_metrics: keep the source independent from BTC market outcomes

revision_boundary: AssetEODCompletionTime freezes semantic publication latency and the file hash freezes this downloaded vintage; it is not a historical revision-vintage archive

source_semantics.BlkCnt: main-chain blocks created in the interval
source_semantics.HashRate: Coin Metrics mean estimated network hash-solving rate
source_semantics.IssTotNtv: new native units issued in the interval
